closed.translate: закрытый, замкнутый, крытый, запертый, законченный, заделанный, под током

examples.eng: Closed for inventory.
She closed the curtains.
She went in and closed the door.
examples.ru: Она вошла (в комнату) и закрыла дверь.

examples.eng: The men closed round him.
The soldiers closed ranks.
The door closed with a jolt.
Chemistry is a closed book to me.
examples.ru: Химия для меня - это закрытая книга.

examples.eng: The box's lid closed with a bang.
The office is closed for the day.
The shops here are closed on Sundays.
examples.ru: Магазины расположенные здесь закрыты по воскресеньям.

examples.eng: Management closed ranks.
The door closed with a click.
The snake closed in for the kill.
She kept her eyes tightly closed.
The brick works closed last year.
examples.ru: Кирпичный завод закрылся в прошлом году.

examples.eng: The office is closed on weekends.
We closed on the house on Friday.
examples.ru: Сделку по дому мы заключили в пятницу.

examples.eng: Darkness closed down on the city.
Anne closed her book and stood up.
Her left hand closed over his arm.
examples.ru: Её левая рука крепко обхватила его руку.

examples.eng: This section of the road is closed.
It was a closed area of employment.
The shops are closed during siesta.
The windows closed with a loud bang.
Make sure all the windows are closed.
...the eagle closed in on its prey...
They closed the deal on the building.
examples.ru: Они закрыли сделку по этому зданию.

examples.eng: a closed mind unreceptive to new ideas
examples.ru: закрытый разум, невосприимчивый к новым идеям

examples.eng: I stepped outside and closed the door.
examples.ru: Я вышел на улицу и закрыл дверь.

examples.eng: Would you mind if I closed the window?
examples.ru: Вы не возражаете, если я закрою окно?
